creator: asgari@gmail.com
text:
Realtek 8110SC with device ID 0x814910ec is not detected by FreeBSD 7.1. Most of New Mini-ITX boards are based on this chip.

Here is a photo of the chips : Here is a photo of the daughterboard : http://i663.photobucket.com/albums/uu359/asgari/SANY0321-Low.jpg

Trying to mount root from ufs:/dev/ad0s1a

Fix: 

I have no idea but someone has replied my post on pfsense forum :

Well it looks like the only issue is that Jetway has changed the PCI IDs and that those IDs are not claimed by the re driver. It should be a trivial kernel patch to fix this, but I don't have the expertise or development environment set up to do it myself.
How-To-Repeat: By using any NEW Jetway Board, Daughterboard, ... I've heard it's been used some other Mini-ITX and ITX boards like MSI, Tyan
